strengths: Excellent character recognition; the specific attributes (fedora/sunglasses, long hair, beanie/glasses, microphone) make the celebrity inspirations instantly recognizable in a caricature style.
Strong composition for a lobby icon; the 4-head diamond arrangement creates a solid, readable shape.
Vibrant, warm color palette with a dynamic burst background fits the 'cheerful funny atmosphere' perfectly.
Clear, chunky outlines ensure readability at small sizes.
issues: Minor inconsistencies in pixel resolution (mixels) between the background burst effects and the character faces, characteristic of AI pixel art.
The 'lane puzzle' mechanic is abstract, represented only by the grid arrangement, though this is acceptable for an icon.
revisedPrompt: Design a 16-bit pixel art lobby icon. Centered composition of four character heads arranged in a tight 2x2 grid. Characters: 1) Woman holding a mic, 2) Man with fedora and sunglasses, 3) Man with long wavy rocker hair, 4) Man with beanie and glasses. Background is a dynamic comic-style sunburst in warm red and gold colors. Ensure a strict, consistent pixel grid (no mixels) for a true retro arcade look. High contrast, thick outlines, cheerful expressions. No text.
